rankings.reason: Provides the most comprehensive, structured step-by-step guide and clear, actionable advice for avoiding common travel mistakes.
Captures the influencer persona perfectly, though it lacks the detailed, practical step-by-step instructions required for first-time travelers.
Offers a decent outline but fails to provide the requested advice section, merely repeating steps instead of tips.
Lacks a structured step-by-step guide for the airport process, focusing only on general pre-travel preparation.
